We offer clients a full holistic financial planning service

Welcome to Brooks Wealth Management LLP – Financial Planning and Asset Management

At BWM we specialise in advising clients of all types on their financial planning requirements.

We are a fully independent financial advisory firm based in Bristol with clients throughout the country.

Our aim is to establish short and long term financial goals and objectives for you and to build a bespoke financial plan that helps you to achieve your financial ambitions. We will review all your existing plans and investments to ensure they remain suitable and tax efficient and will incorporate these into your future planning.

Contact us today   for a confidential initial meeting to find out how we can help you.

More about us

What we offer

Our approach to financial planning

Your financial plan is personalised strategy that provides detailed guidance regarding how an individual or family should organise their finances in order to achieve their financial and lifestyle goals.

Our services for individuals

To prepare your financial plan we will spend some time talking with you to identify your goals over the short, medium and long term.

Our services for businesses

We have great deal of experience not only in dealing with the corporate aspects of financial planning but also in working alongside accountants and business advisers in devising appropriate client solutions.

Brooks Wealth Management LLP is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. Financial Services Register No: 473759   http://www.fca.org.uk/register .

Brooks Wealth Management LLP Registered Address: 10 Radnor Road, Henleaze, BS9 4DX. Registered in England & Wales, No. OC331415.

Neither Brooks Wealth Management LLP nor its representatives can be held responsible for the accuracy of the contents/information contained within the linked site(s) accessible from this page.

The Financial Conduct Authority does not regulate National Savings or some forms of mortgage, tax planning, taxation and trust advice, offshore investments or school fees planning.

The Financial Ombudsman Service (FOS) is an agency for arbitrating on unresolved complaints between regulated firms and their clients. Full details of the FOS can be found on its website at   http://www.financial-ombudsman.org.uk .

The information contained within this site is subject to the UK regulatory regime and is therefore targeted primarily at consumers based in the UK.

Please read our   Privacy Statement   before completing any enquiry form or before sending an email to us.

About us

About us

About us
Meet the team

How we work

Our fees

Legal statement

Privacy statement

Brooks Wealth Management was started by Jeremy Brooks in January 2006. Following 10 very enjoyable years with Mazars, a national firm of accountants and auditors, Jeremy felt that the time had come to start his own business. Behind this was a desire to offer a bespoke but cost effective proposition to clients, built on excellent service and regular face to face meetings to assess progress.

At BWM we offer clients a full holistic financial planning service. The main aim is to build a long term relationship with both personal and corporate clients to see them through all stages of the financial planning process, from protection to wealth accumulation, to retirement and inheritance tax mitigation. Although, of course, we will undertake one-off assignments as appropriate to individual needs.

All recommendations are discussed at length and any costs are agreed before implementation.

We will use appropriate tax wrappers to make investments as tax efficient as possible and will build bespoke portfolios based upon attitude to risk, age, other assets held and any other relevant factors.

Portfolios are reviewed on a regular basis and changes are made as and when appropriate for both tactical and strategic reasons. Please see the section on Investment Strategy for more information.

We encourage clients to phone or email with queries or concerns at any time and we are always available to discuss matters, particularly in times of market uncertainty.

We also offer lifetime cash flow analysis forecasts to run alongside the investment portfolios; these provide an ongoing progress report as to likelihood of your financial objectives being met at any given time in the future.

We have a strong background in professional practice and are experienced in working with solicitors and accountants to ensure that all legal and tax matters are considered for each client.

We are members of the Institute of Financial Planning.

Brooks Wealth Management LLP is authorised and regulated by the Financial Conduct Authority. Financial Services Register No: 473759   http://www.fca.org.uk/register .
